text:
Created attachment 216782
patch for ports/games/dMagnetic/

Hello.
So, my project games/dMagnetic saw release 0.25. 

I took the liberty of updating the port for you. 
Since I am not much of a FreeBSD user, I would kindly ask you if you guys could have a look, check if it matches your standards.


Thank you!

Thomas
